name: chronicle-mcp
description: Unified session history and local semantic search MCP server

scripts.test: node --test dist/__tests__/search.test.js dist/__tests__/SessionParser.test.js dist/__tests__/HistoryStore.test.js dist/__tests__/EmbeddingClient.test.js dist/__tests__/Benchmarking.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('coverage', {recursive: true})" && node --experimental-test-coverage --test --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter=lcov --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter-destination=coverage/lcov.info dist/__tests__/search.test.js dist/__tests__/SessionParser.test.js dist/__tests__/HistoryStore.test.js dist/__tests__/EmbeddingClient.test.js dist/__tests__/Benchmarking.test.js && node scripts/fix-lcov.js
